title: Giantree Luxury Ballpoint Pens, 5 Pack 1.0mm Metal Business Retractable Pens Smooth Writing Gel Ink Pen Black Ink for Daily Work School Writing Stationery Office Supplies(Black)
features: 【Metallic Ballpoint Pens】The luxury pen is made of metal, with a quality surface finish that will never be tarnished, Twist action to open, has a nice weight to grip with good balance, and sleekness really feels good in the hand.

【Comfortable Grip】The metal rollerball pen is designed with a balanced build that feels substantial when held, yet never tires your wrist, even during prolonged writing sessions. Its smooth performance ensures that your writing experience is always a joy to use.

【Smooth Writing】Our luxury ballpoint pen delivers a fluid, smooth performance that is blotch, skip, and spill-free. Its 1.0mm medium point, high-quality black ink, and continuous ink flow ensure that your text is preserved for the long term.
【Portable Design】A durable metal clip keeps your pen on the book, clipboard, or notebook, and you also can easily hook one on your shirt pocket to carry it around, at hand for you to apply in time.

【Perfect Gift Pens】These chic writing instruments are perfect for the guest book table at weddings, showers, parties, or anywhere a guest book is needed. Perfect gift for Graduation, Business, men, teacher, father's day, etc
description: Giantree 5Pcs Business Metal Retractable Ballpoint Pen for Daily Work School Writing Stationery Office Supplies Packing list: 5pcs x ballpoint pen material: metal Pen shell color: white Refill color: black Pen core specification: 1.0mm Product size: single 13*0.7cm/5.11*0.27in Package size: 18*12*0.8cm Features: Smooth Ink: Black ink pens have built-in precision ink output regulators, which can ensure liquid ink flows evenly that give you a smooth writing experience. Wide range of applications: Ballpoint pens are suitable for schools, offices, parties, meetings, trade shows, corporate events, etc. You can use them to mark different words and take some important notes. Ideal gifts for students, coworkers, family, and friends.
